name: SAS Risk Management
description: Integrated credit, market, and operational risk analytics platform with regulatory reporting capabilities for Basel III/IV, IFRS 9, and local regulatory frameworks including BSP and Insurance Commission requirements.
elevatorPitch: Integrated credit, market, and operational risk analytics with regulatory reporting for Basel III/IV and IFRS 9.
capabilities: Credit scoring and rating model development
Stress testing under multiple macroeconomic scenarios
Market risk VaR and sensitivity analysis
Operational risk quantification and scenario analysis
Portfolio risk aggregation and concentration analysis
targetBuyer: Chief Risk Officer, Head of Credit Risk, Head of Market Risk, Chief Actuary
phUseCases: IFRS 9 adoption and ECL calculation for Philippine banks
Stress testing for BSP Financial Stability reports
Credit scoring for Philippine consumer lending
